query: SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.pdiId, p.id as pdi_id, p.colaboradorId FROM actions a LEFT JOIN pdis p ON a.pdiId = p.id WHERE p.colaboradorId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'simone@empresa.com')
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.pdiId, p.id as pdi_id, p.colaboradorId FROM actions a LEFT JOIN pdis p ON a.pdiId = p.id WHERE p.colaboradorId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'simone@empresa.com')
